summary.title: Vera-Rubin Kimi-K2.6 profile strategy Pareto
summary.description: Profile sweep candidates for monolithic, MTP, PD, AF, AF+MTP, and PD+AF modes.
summary.pareto_rule: for each fixed gpu_num, maximize TPS per user and total throughput across the strategy candidate set
summary.mtp_note: MTP points are native cost-model simulation rows. Stage 0 is the matching baseline decode row; stage > 0 rows require MTP_on and mtp_stage to be simulated in the raw sweep.
summary.pp_note: PP is swept when --pp-values includes values beyond 1. PD rows cap prefill at 20% of the fixed total, rounded down to an 8-GPU multiple, with decode taking the remainder. Decode A/F split rows pin the F side to groq-lpx3.
